'''Taoska''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] orbiting the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Tyrius/Legends|Tyrius]] in the [[Tyrius system/Legends|Tyrius system]]. Located in the [[Savareen sector/Legends|Savareen sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], it was an ice ball that was visible from [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]].<ref name="Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide">''[[Shadows of the Empire Planets Guide]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
